title: Tamil Nadu election 2026: Egmore constituency residents weigh infrastructure upgrades against long-standing civic problems
description: As Metro Rail work is ongoing in Purasawalkam, traffic congestion and disrupted MTC bus services to some pockets remain core issues; travelling on arterial stretches of Demellows Road - Sydenhams Road and Choolai High Road is a harrowing experience for motorists due to sewer work
